Disorder: Loss Mouth Eating Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had loss of liquids/solids from the mouth when eating or drinking. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
369 K0100B_HLD_FOOD_MOUTH_CD K0100B_HLD_FOOD_MOUTH_CD K0100B Swallowing Disorder: Hold Food Mouth Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident held food in the mouth or cheeks or had residual food in the mouth after meals. -=Not assessed/no
